data.name: Voymastina

weaponImprint.name: 6P71
weaponImprint.trait: After attacking an enemy target with defense less than or equal to 0, deals 1 point of fixed stability damage.
weaponImprint.effect: Increases Physical damage dealt by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. Physical damage ignores 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%/45% of the target's defense.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to targets with defensive debuffs by 2.5% and increases damage dealt 2.5% to Girard Group units.

data.effects:
No matter how difficult the task is, Voymastina has a way to give a feasible mission plan. In the team, she is the sharpest knife, the strongest shield, and the most reliable component of the entire plan. But sometimes, you will sigh, as fortunately she has never appeared against you.
"If you want to become the "Strongest T-Doll", tactics, efficiency, experience...... Each one is indispensable."

skills.name: Dread Ultimatum
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Mastiff’s Pledge
skills.description:
Voymastina is immune to displacement and mobility debuffs.

Voymastina does not benefit from cover protection, but damage taken is reduced by 30%. When stability is greater than 0, this damage reduction is increased to 80%.

When dealing Physical damage, ignores 50% of the target's defense. After using an active skill or basic attack, Voymastina gains 2 points of Confectance Index. At maximum Confectance Index, consumes all points of Confectance Index and gains [effect:951e2741-a202-4d41-ae0e-281c9c9daa0f].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Immunity to displacement and movement debuffs. Increase movement speed by 2 tiles.

Cannot take protection from cover and damage received is reduced by 30%. When stability is greater than 0, damage received is reduced to 80%.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:3b20ad47-0a62-419f-af97-31034f7283f6] for 1 round. Gain or refresh the duration of [effect:3b20ad47-0a62-419f-af97-31034f7283f6] when dealing damage with 2 or more active skills or passive effects in each round. For each [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], gain 1 stack of [effect:3ee65c92-5fb4-4c30-a1a7-a09aabd20be6].

When Attack is increased, increase Defense by 50% of the Attack increase, up to a maximum of 30% of initial Defense.

When dealing Physical damage, ignores 125% of the target's defense. After using an active skill or basic attack, gain 2 Confectance Index. When Confectance Index is full, consume all points of Confectance Index and gain [effect:951e2741-a202-4d41-ae0e-281c9c9daa0f].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Increase movement speed by 2 tiles.

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:3b20ad47-0a62-419f-af97-31034f7283f6]. Gain or refresh the duration of [effect:3b20ad47-0a62-419f-af97-31034f7283f6] when dealing damage with 2 or more active skill or passive effects in each round. For each [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], gain 1 stack of [effect:3ee65c92-5fb4-4c30-a1a7-a09aabd20be6].

When Attack is increased, increase Defense by 50% of the Attack increase, up to a maximum of 30% of initial Defense.

When dealing Physical damage, the amount of the target's defense ignored increases to 125%.

skills.name: Sirius Fall
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 120% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 3 tiles of it.

Passive: When an enemy unit within attack range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, Voymastina performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to the target and all enemy units within 3 tiles of it. This effect can be triggered once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects an enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 5 tiles.

Passive: When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 150% of attack and 4 points of stability damage to the target and all enemy targets within 5 tiles. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects an enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 180% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 5 tiles.

Passive: When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 150% of attack and 4 points of stability damage to the target and all enemy targets within 5 tiles. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per turn. When performing any [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], gain 1 stack of [effect:3ca0a5e5-d420-4d44-a00e-f0cc2b4ee2b9].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased to 180%, stability damage increased by 2 points, and effective range increased by 2 tiles.

Passive damage multiplier increased to 150%, stability damage increased by 1 point, and effective range increased by 2 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Passive gains an additional effect: When performing any [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], gain 1 stack of [effect:3ca0a5e5-d420-4d44-a00e-f0cc2b4ee2b9].

skills.name: Eye of the White Mastiff
skills.description:
Voymastina gains [effect:1eea564f-6f6c-4a60-945b-1c1fab44017d] for 2 rounds. After skill usage, she gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

Passive: At the start of the battle, deals Physical damage that ignores cover equal to 100% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to the closest 5 enemy targets on the battlefield. Voymastina is immune to damage and fixed damage, lasting until the end of this passive effect.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Gains [effect:1eea564f-6f6c-4a60-945b-1c1fab44017d] for 3 rounds. After the skill, gains 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

Passive: At the start of the battle, deals Physical damage ignoring cover reduction equal to 300% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to the 10 nearest enemy targets on the entire field, and applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn. Immunity to damage and stability damage last until the end of this passive.

Before this skill's active and passive attacks, applies [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9] to the target for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Increase duration of [effect:1eea564f-6f6c-4a60-945b-1c1fab44017d] by 1 round; damage multiplier increased to 130% and removes target trigger limit. If an enemy target spawns within range, deals targeted Physical damage equal to 130% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to the target.

Passive effect damage multiplier increased to 300%, number of enemy targets increased to 10, and applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn after attacking.

Before this skill's active and passive attacks, apply [effect:f2edbeb3-9755-49e7-91f4-dc6fba3b30d9] to the target for 2 turns.
vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.vertebraeName: Eye of the White Mastiff Lv.2

skills.name: Pile Bunker
skills.description:
Selects a direction and deals AoE melee Physical damage that ignores cover equal to 200% of attack to all enemy targets within a forward-facing 1×2 tile area in the selected direction. After skill usage, Voymastina gains [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

Passive: When an enemy unit within attack range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, Voymastina performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], charges to an empty tile within a 2-tile wide area of the target's tile, then deals targeted melee Physical damage that ignores cover equal to 150% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to it. If there are no empty tiles to charge to, shoots the enemy target to deal damage instead. This effect can trigger up to 1 time per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects a direction and deals AoE melee Physical damage ignoring cover reduction equal to 200% of attack to all enemy targets within a 1x2 area in front. Gains [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

Passive: When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs an instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], charge to an open tile within a 2 tile width range of the target, deals targetted melee Physical damage ignoring cover reduction equal to 150% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If there is no open tile, fire at the target instead. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per turn. Before this skill's active and passive attacks, increase attack by 10% for 1 round; apply [effect:928be1f8-b168-4790-a004-73b489a3ad34] on the target for 2 rounds.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects a direction and deals AoE melee Physical damage ignoring cover reduction equal to 300% of attack to all enemy targets within a 1x2 area in front. When [effect:951e2741-a202-4d41-ae0e-281c9c9daa0f] is active, increases attack by 30%. Gains [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

Passive: When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs an instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], charge to an open tile within a 2 tile width range of the target, deals targetted melee Physical damage ignoring cover reduction equal to 150% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If there is no open tile, fire at the target instead. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per turn. Before this skill's active and passive attacks, increase attack by 10% for 1 round; apply [effect:928be1f8-b168-4790-a004-73b489a3ad34] for 2 rounds and [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] for 2 turns on the target.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Before this skill's active and passive attacks, increases attack by 10% for 1 round; apply [effect:928be1f8-b168-4790-a004-73b489a3ad34] to the target for 2 rounds.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Damage multiplier increased to 300%. When Voymastina has [effect:951e2741-a202-4d41-ae0e-281c9c9daa0f], increases attack by 30%.

Before this skill's active and passive attacks, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the target for 2 turns.

keys.effect: When dealing melee damage, increases Physical damage dealt by 10% for 1 round.
When active skill Celestial Wolf Pack or its passive effect hit a boss unit or 3 or more enemy targets, gain [effect:af640815-bbef-471b-8888-cee6c3d8b4a4].
After triggering the passive effect of Crushing Fang, gain [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] for 2 turns.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Wide Field of View

keys.effect: The range of all [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is changed to the entire field and increases damage dealt to non-boss enemy targets by 30%.
When the active skill Celestial Wolf Pack or its passive effect hit only 1 target, the damage dealt is increased by 20% and the stability damage is increased by 2 points.
Before attacking, gain [effect:111861b3-c5e8-49d2-bc9d-b4044ab5945e] for 3 turns.
After being attacked, the next usage of the Ultimate skill Crushing Fang increases damage dealt by 15%.

vertebrae.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased to 180%, stability damage increased by 2 points, and effective range increased by 2 tiles.

Passive damage multiplier increased to 150%, stability damage increased by 1 point, and effective range increased by 2 tiles.

doll.name: Voymastina
doll.effects:
No matter how difficult the task is, Voymastina has a way to give a feasible mission plan. In the team, she is the sharpest knife, the strongest shield, and the most reliable component of the entire plan. But sometimes, you will sigh, as fortunately she has never appeared against you.
"If you want to become the "Strongest T-Doll", tactics, efficiency, experience...... Each one is indispensable."

At the start of the battle, gain [effect:3b20ad47-0a62-419f-af97-31034f7283f6] for 1 round. Gain or refresh the duration of [effect:3b20ad47-0a62-419f-af97-31034f7283f6] when dealing damage with 2 or more active skills or passive effects in each round. For each [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], gain 1 stack of [effect:3ee65c92-5fb4-4c30-a1a7-a09aabd20be6].

When Attack is increased, increase Defense by 50% of the Attack increase, up to a maximum of 30% of initial Defense.

When dealing Physical damage, ignores 125% of the target's defense. After using an active skill or basic attack, gain 2 Confectance Index. When Confectance Index is full, consume all points of Confectance Index and gain [effect:951e2741-a202-4d41-ae0e-281c9c9daa0f].

imagoforms.effect: When dealing melee damage, damage dealt increases by 8%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Damage dealt increased by 45% and critical damage increased by 30%. This effect cannot be cleansed.

If this effect stacks up to 5 times, trigger the passive effect of the active skill Eye of the White Mastiff once at the start of the next round. Triggers up to 1 time per battle. This effect cannot be cleansed.
Before an active attack, ignores 50% of the target's Defense, Critical Rate increased by 30% and Critical Damage increased by 25%. This effect cannot be cleansed.
When attacked by Voymastina, reduce Defense by 40%. This debuff cannot be cleansed.
Damage dealt and critical rate increased by 10%, stacking up to 3 times. This effect cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

When an enemy unit within 8 tiles attempts to move, attack, or at the end of the action, perform 1 instance of Lock-On Attack, dealing physical damage ignoring cover equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to enemy targets within 3x3 tiles area, triggering 1 time per target. This effect can be triggered up to 6 times per round.

","upgrades":[{"id":"7ead2771-289b-41a8-a474-6af779e02fd0","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

When an enemy unit within 8 tiles attempts to move, attack, or at the end of the action, perform 1 instance of Lock-On Attack, dealing AoE physical damage ignoring cover equal to 130% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to enemy targets within 3x3 tiles area. This effect can be triggered up to 6 times per round. If a new enemy target spawns within range, deal targeted physical damage equal to 130% of attack and 1 point of stability damage without consuming the number of times.
